title: Part 3 – Conversation : déménagement de bureau
instructions: Écoutez la conversation, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Man: I heard we're moving to a new building next month. Do you know which floor we'll be on? Woman: Yes, we've been assigned to the seventh floor. There's a great view of the city park. Man: That sounds nice. Will we have enough space? I heard the new office is slightly smaller. Woman: It is, but the company is providing extra storage units for each team. Man: Good to know. Will the move affect our normal schedule? Woman: Not really. The movers will come over the weekend, so we should be set up by Monday morning.

questions.prompt: What are the speakers mainly talking about?
questions.explanation: Ils discutent du déménagement prévu dans un nouveau bâtiment.

questions.prompt: What concern does the man raise?
choices: Whether there will be enough space
The view from the new office
The location of the new building
questions.explanation: Il demande : "Will we have enough space? I heard the new office is slightly smaller."

choices: At the end of the month
questions.explanation: "The movers will come over the weekend".
